## DeviceDetector.breakpoints property

Record of the device name, that can be whatever you want `xs`<!-- -->, `mobile`<!-- -->, `big`<!-- -->... And the max width in pixels for that device.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
readonly breakpoints: Record<Device, MaxWidth>;
```
